classification_reasons.api-shape: Changing the warned shape is deferred to the public API review.
classification_reasons.boundary: The signature or import shape is imposed by a binding or protocol boundary.
classification_reasons.test: The allowance exists only for a test, fixture, or numeric test literal.
classification_reasons.transitional: Internal debt is inventoried for removal or localization in the next phase.
classification_reasons.dead-code: Dead-code allowances are audited separately from style and API lints.
